# McpServer.RegisterTool method

Registers a tool and its handler (spec §16). Names must be unique within the server.

```csharp
public void RegisterTool(Tool tool, ToolHandler handler)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| tool | The tool definition (name, schemas, annotations). |
| handler | The invocation handler. |
